description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows and clean, geometric lines. The structure includes a cantilevered upper floor that extends over a driveway with a parked car, and a small patch of grass with a palm tree. The rear of the house opens to a patio area with outdoor seating, a hot tub, and additional landscaping, including another palm tree. The house has a mix of white and green roof surfaces, with the green area likely serving as a rooftop garden. The windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, airy spaces and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a cantilevered upper floor, and landscaped outdoor areas including a patio and rooftop garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cantilevered upper floor, driveway with car, main entrance, and a palm tree on a small lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green rooftop garden, secondary entrance, and partial view of the patio and hot tub.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area with outdoor seating, hot tub, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the car under the cantilevered section, palm tree, and the solid wall with a large window.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no porch, and a small overhang; driveway leads directly to the entrance.
